name: Evan Bayh
subject: Hoosier Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e1/7be36b49/1e1e246e/78f9acdb/1499599359/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I've talked a lot about Hoosier values in this campaign. I wanted to tell you a little bit about what those mean to me.

I get mine from Shirkieville -- a small town just north of Terre Haute. It's where I was born and raised. I learned from folks there, like my babysitter Sue, that doing the right thing isn't always about doing the easy thing. It takes being honest and a straight shooter to do right by Hoosiers.

You can find these values in any Indiana town. And I'm proud that I've tried every day to live up to them during my time as Indiana's governor and senator. **Now I 'm ready to bring Hoosier values back to the Senate to break the gridlock, but I need your help in this final stretch of our campaign.**

**[Are you able to chip in $5 to help us raise the final $2,690 we need to hit our last end of month goal?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e1/7be36b49/1e1e246e/78f9acda/1499599359/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.4&amount=10") If you donate before midnight your gift will be matched.**

All of you have made me so proud during this hard-fought campaign. **I 'm reminded every day that the reason you're all working so hard to get me elected is because we share the same values.**

Ensuring an affordable college education for our kids means that they have a shot at being tomorrow's leaders. Protecting Medicare and Social Security means that our seniors can retire with dignity. Fighting against bad trade deals means we don't just turn a blind eye to companies outsourcing Hoosier jobs.

All of the issues in this campaign are about looking out for each other. That's what Hoosier values mean to me.

**[I know I've asked you more times than I can count by now -- but can you pitch in $5 to help us hit our final end-of-month goal? It will make all the difference for us on election night.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e1/7be36b49/1e1e246e/78f9acda/1499599359/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.4&amount=10")**

I'm ready to go to the Senate to fight for our Hoosier values. I'm ready to fight for you, friend.

Thanks for all you do,

Evan **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e1/7be36b49/1e1e246e/78f9acd9/1499599359/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finaleom?refcode=20161031nd.4&amount=25")**********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505e1/7be36b49/1e1e246e/78f9acd8/1499599359/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We need you -- asking one last time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Asking for your help in this last week. | Dear Friend, These progressive champions don't step up unless it's important:
* Barack Obama
* Hillary Clinton
* Tim Kaine
* Gabby Giffords

But they've all pushed Washingtonians to vote for progress - they are all loud and clear: Washington state needs to turn out and vote for our campaign and for progressives up and down the ballot. So, now I'm asking one final time before we hit the last (and biggest) end-of-month deadline of our campaign in just a few hours. (And one last time before the trick-or-treating starts!) [**Will you rush a last-minute donation to my campaign? Your support really matters.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=2&rj=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&rt=0)**
In every part of our state, voters are now focusing on their selection for governor. We'll see a surge of ballots completed and returned in the next few days.
Our opponent has big-dollar friends, he has Donald Trump's backers, but I have you -- and I know this is the team that's going to propel us to victory -- and to four more years of profound, progressive change for Washington.
As we close out this campaign, I am grateful for friends like you who are willing to do all you can to make sure our vision of progress and growth prevails. That's why I'm asking you to make a donation for our last week of GOTV efforts. It's essential we reach as many voters as possible this week.
[**Will you help with a contribution right now? We must raise another $4,115 by midnight.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you for helping out again. We must make sure Washington voters are able to compare and contrast our accomplishments and forward thinking with my opponent's backward agenda.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTc5MjY5NAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDAyNDIwOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Memo from Kellyanne
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38473553:WgtFaEuNV:m:1:876315805:D90978D933891E6FC3B25166DA5BE1E2:r)
Peter,

I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win.

If you don't read the entire memo below, I've highlighted key points that you NEED to know.

[**After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 7 days from today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38473553:WgtFaEuNV:m:1:876315805:D90978D933891E6FC3B25166DA5BE1E2:r)

BEFORE donating, you'll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in.

TO: Peter Willis
FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager
RE: Donald Trump's Path to 270 Electoral Votes

Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We've outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win.

While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call.
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38473553:WgtFaEuNV:m:1:876315805:D90978D933891E6FC3B25166DA5BE1E2:r)
Over the past month, polls have _shown us winning_ **Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada,** and**North Carolina.** If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. _**But we 'd still have 4 electoral votes to go.**_

Polls show us _close_ in **New** **Hampshire** , **Colorado** , and **Pennsylvania**. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory.

We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory.
###
Peter: with just 7 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we'll need your continued support.

**Because you 've been such a critical supporter, you'll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in.**

[**Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5, to help us stay on track to win just 7 days from today.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38473553:WgtFaEuNV:m:1:876315805:D90978D933891E6FC3B25166DA5BE1E2:r)

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38473553:WgtFaEuNV:m:1:876315805:D90978D933891E6FC3B25166DA5BE1E2:r)** | Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
---

---

subject: We will win on the ISSUES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Share your input on which issues we focus on. |

Friend, There are just 7 days left until YOU get to choose America’s future. The stakes of an election have never been higher. Either we win the presidency -- or we lose our country. Which is why I’m calling your undivided attention to our newly released Presidential Questionnaire. Friend, please take the Presidential Questionnaire to help us deliver a victory for the American people. This election comes down to the important issues our country is facing. Will we continue down the road of big-government spending, high taxes, excessive regulations, endless wars, terrible trade deals, and open borders... Or will we cut taxes, grow the economy, reinvigorate, control our borders, and finally put America First? The choice is clear, but I need your help presenting it to the American people. Please consider it your priority to complete your questionnaire as soon as possible. Please step up with only 7 days left and take the Presidential Questionnaire. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Take Survey Now

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Lesley Robinson, Greg for Montana
subject: Critical voter information!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican |
body:
November 8th is coming up fast, and I'm counting on your vote! | | |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475972:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

We're locked in a heated battle for Montana's future. In recent days, our race has been described as a "toss-up" and "too close to call." |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475973:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| **It 's going to come down to the wire, and we have just one week until Election Day!**

Greg and I are working overtime to win, so we can get to work on bringing high-paying jobs and greater opportunity to Montana. Every vote is critical.

_I hope to count on your support!_

In case you have any questions about casting your vote, here are a few resources:
* [**Click here**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475974:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) to find your polling place or check your registration status.
* [**Click here**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475975:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) for details on turning in your absentee ballot.
* [**Click here**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475976:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) for details on late registration, if you are not registered yet. You can register all the way up through 8:00 p.m. on Election Day.

You can also see Greg and I out on the trail during our final Whistle Stop Tour. [**Click here for dates and locations**](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475973:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r):

Our opponent is unencumbered by the truth and he's hurled a lot of lies at us. We are happy to address any questions you have about these false attacks. Please email [**info@gregformontana.com**](mailto:info@gregformontana.com) and we'll set the record straight.

Also, if you have any additional questions on voting, you can contact our campaign at [**info@gregformontana.com**](mailto:info@gregformontana.com) and we'll help you out.

**Again, be sure to cast your vote for Gianforte/Robinson ... and please forward this email to your family, friends and neighbors, and ask them to cast their votes for a better Montana future too!**

Thank you,

Lesley Robinson |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| [](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/38475977:WyiLmouNN:m:1:1369946915:DF45E683ADB0AEA397AED87D646E1A17:r) |

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**November 1, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**In New Ad, Phil Scott Pitches Plans to Make Vermont Even Better******
**Middlesex, Vt., 2016 –** Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, today released a new ad outlining his vision for an even better Vermont. The video ad, titled “Even Better,” will run on web and TV in the final week of the campaign.

“Vermont’s a great place and together we can make it even better,” Scott explains. “Let’s focus on growing the economy and creating jobs. Let’s make government more efficient and healthcare and housing more affordable. Let’s prioritize investments in pro-growth areas like early education and infrastructure.”

Throughout the campaign, Scott has detailed his plans to achieve these goals, which can be viewed at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=486bf6a615&e=19cebfe173). With more than 50 proposals, initiatives and ideas, Scott’s plan for economic growth is by far the most comprehensive plan to strengthen Vermont’s economy and make the state more affordable.

“If you’re ready for a governor who has real plans to move Vermont forward, I’d be honored to have your support. And I will not let you down,” Scott concludes.

###
Watch the full ad here:

name: My Faith Votes
subject: LIVE w/ The Kendrick Brothers
body:
A Conversation with The Kendrick Brothers.

View this email in your browser.

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with
The Kendrick Brothers
Host: Megan West
Topic: Prayer and how it can transform your
community and our nation.
Date: NOV 4TH
Time: 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT)

"If we return to prayer, passionately and
actively seek the Lord, and we're right with him and right with
each other, God can do amazing things in our lives."
-Alex Kendrick

Are you one of the millions who have seen the
award-winning Christian film War Room? This film inspired
Christians all across the world to become serious about their
prayer lives. Thousands of closets were transformed into "War
Rooms" and lives were changed forever.

Join host, Megan West, for a conversation
with Alex and Stephen Kendrick, the creators of War Room,
Courageous, Fireproof, Facing the Giants, and Flywheel. This
exclusive My Faith Matters LIVE Conversation with the Kendrick
Brothers will be streamed live over the Internet at
MyFaithVotes.org and Facebook Live, or if you are on the move,
sign up for our interactive call and listen on your phone.

While the past twelve months have been taxing
for nearly all Americans as we pick new leaders for our country,
on this one night, we will be reminded that through a
strengthened prayer life, anything is possible if we simply turn
to the King of Kings and find peace.

Come join us as we laugh, pray, and answer
your questions LIVE.

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate
Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the
Church in America.

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with
The Kendrick Brothers
Host: Megan West
Topic: Prayer and how it can transform your
community and our nation.
Date: NOV 4TH
Time: 7PM (ET) / 4PM (PT)

Hey Listen --

With just 7 days (ONE WEEK!) left in this race, we wanted you to remember this fact:

Six years ago, Pat Toomey won his seat by fewer than 9 votes per precinct.

This race is going to be __even closer__. Nearly every poll shows this race within the __margin of error__ and every expert is still calling this race a pure __toss-up__.

**Look, there is no "next week" anymore. This is it -- chip in $5 or more now:**

**[Quick, donate now->](https://act.myngp.com/el/3896791404952682496/-3648170784867745792?refcode=e20161101.2&refcode2=e20161101.2nd&amount=25)**

Team Katie

There are only 7 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

name: Russ Feingold
subject: We aim high
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Thank you for all that you have done to power this campaign. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4670/1c469400/126addc/3543c56/935739938/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_oct-eom-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_oct-eom-ty_nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom-ty&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Throughout this campaign, we've set steep fundraising goals. **We aim high because we know what we're up against.** And time and time again, this grassroots team has stepped up to conquer our goals. The money we've raised doesn't just keep the lights on in our campaign headquarters. (Though, it helps -- and my campaign team appreciates it!) Your donations are helping us reach more Wisconsinites with our targeted get-out-the-vote efforts. Your support will be the reason we elect Democrats up and down the ballot in just one week. And your support shows me, Senator Johnson, and everyone whose eyes are on this race exactly what you stand for: A progressive platform that lifts up ALL Americans. So, no matter what you've given, or what you've done to help my campaign: Thank you. One week left. Let's win this. Sincerely, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4670/1c469400/126addc/3543c56/935739938/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_oct-eom-ty_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_oct-eom-ty_nd&utm_campaign=oct-eom-ty&utm_medium=ema")

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Memo from Kellyanne
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Prepared by my campaign manager. Please read to see our path forward. |

Friend, I want to share this important memo prepared by my campaign manager, Kellyanne, on where we currently stand in the race for the White House and what we must do to lock in a win. If you don’t read the entire memo below, I’ve highlighted key points that you NEED to know. After reading the memo, please consider making a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 7 days from today. BEFORE donating, you’ll also be able to indicate your preference for the state we invest your contribution in. TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Kellyanne Conway, Campaign Manager RE: Donald Trump’s Path to 270 Electoral Votes ________________________________________ Donald Trump must reach 270 electoral votes to win the presidency. We’ve outlined a map to show where we currently stand as well as the possible paths forward to win. While we are not taking any state for granted, those colored red are states that we can safely assume will vote for Donald Trump. Blue states favor Hillary. Blank states are too close to call. Over the past month, polls have shown us winning Iowa, Ohio, Maine, Florida, Nevada, and North Carolina. If we maintain our leads in those six states, we can reliably claim 266 electoral votes. Hillary can claim 193. But we’d still have 4 electoral votes to go. Polls show us close in New Hampshire, Colorado, and Pennsylvania. Winning just any one of those states would lead us to victory. We are currently executing a highly costly early voting push and get-out-the-vote operation to ensure identified Trump supporters make it to the polls before Election Day. We are also planning a $140 million-dollar ad blitz in battleground states to lead us to victory. Friend: with just 7 days left, we have a few paths to win. But we’ll need your continued support. Because you’ve been such a critical supporter, you’ll also be able to share your preference on which state we should invest your contribution in. Please make a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $35, $15, or $5 to help us stay on track to win just 7 days from today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump
CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: Eric Hyers
subject: why we keep emailing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

I wanted to give you some insight into why we email you so much. **And then to ask you to[pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AY3%2BID5vw%2FqTAWt3WE7NCUc8f6tpPMbL)**

I frequently get detailed updates as to how much Greg Gianforte is adding to his TV and radio spending. These stress me out. **The latest is that he has upped his buy by a _whopping $293,000_ for this final week.**

Here's the recent breakdown that I just got:

_Gianforte added $239K on broadcast for 10/31 to 11/8 in Billings, Missoula, Great Falls, Butte-Bozeman, Helena, and Glendive. He also added $50K on cable for 10/31 to 11/8 spread across all markets, $4K on satellite and $20K on radio spread across all markets._
I wish I could say that it doesn't matter. But this race is nationally ranked as a "Toss up" and public polling has Steve with a narrow lead. We're a week out from the election and this could come down to these final few days.

**Don't let Greg Gianforte 's big spending decide this race. [Pitch in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5bjL1pmA9AI7LC%2B2N1wCCEc8f6tpPMbL)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zs76Vd3CMtDdIEsxG7YU9Uc8f6tpPMbL)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=A37HyMeW%2F2vAqNwrLfo2e0c8f6tpPMbL).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

There is just ONE week until this election is decided, we're deadlocked in recent polls, and this race is the one that will decide Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court.
That's why we've set a one-day $100,000 goal to help us pull ahead, elect Governor Hassan, take back the majority, and secure the future of the Supreme Court. **[We NEED you to step up and give $3 or more now or else we risk years of reckless obstructionism from a GOP majority.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc38/2a380d31/1710ac70/ffb04c/2817316638/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAxXzFXZWVrMl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161101_1Week2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Let us throw another number at you: $50,000,000 -- that's how much Kelly Ayotte's corporate special interest allies have spent to stop Maggie from winning. And it's working -- a handful of recent polls show that if this election were held today, we would LOSE.
We've set our one-day goal to help push back on all of this outside money, but we can't get there without your help. **[Please donate $3 or more now to elect Maggie and take back the Senate while there's still time.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdc38/2a380d31/1710ac70/ffb04c/2817316638/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTAxXzFXZWVrMl9uaC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161101_1Week2_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Chuck
subject: Shelley Moore Capito
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAPITO FOR WEST VIRGINIA
body:
---
| Friend,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the email that Senator Capito sent to you yesterday. If not, please see below.

Thanks,

Chuck Flannery
Campaign Manager | Cole for Governor **

**\---------- Forwarded message \----------
From: Shelley Moore Capito <info@billcoleforwv.com>
Date: Mon, Oct 31, 2016 at 1:52 PM
Subject: West Virginia needs Bill
To: Chuck <chuckf@cole2016.com>**

******_****_ Dear Chuck –

The election is only days away – and it is critical that we elect a proven leader like Bill Cole as Governor.

West Virginia needs a Governor who knows what it takes to grow jobs and strengthen our economy.

Bill Cole is a proven job creator who understands that a stronger West Virginia requires investments in critical infrastructure like broadband that will make us more competitive now and in the future.

He understands that in order to compete, we must create an environment where our small businesses and our people can thrive.

Bill Cole has the right vision and priorities to move our state forward, and he is exactly the kind of leader we need as West Virginia’s next Governor.
[
**Will you consider chipping in $25, $50 or even $100 to help elect Bill Cole?**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=billcole_nationbuilder_com_capito&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fwd_smc&n=1)

The stakes in this election couldn’t be higher. West Virginia is at a cross roads, and Bill Cole will help put us on the right path.

[**If you can donate a larger amount of $250, $500, or even $1,000 today**](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=Hyperlink_20161028_115426960&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fwd_smc&n=2)**,** please know your financial support will be put to good use in the closing days of this race.

Your support of Bill Cole is so important to the future of our state.

Thank you,

Shelley | [](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/capito?utm_medium=email&utm_source=sp&utm_campaign=20161028_26920620_&utm_content=body_text_donate+button&action=email_click&ha1=&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fwd_smc&n=3)
---

PAID FOR BY CAPITO FOR WEST VIRGINIA
P.O. BOX 11519 - Charleston, WV 25339>
---
This message reflects the opinions and representations of Capito for West Virginia. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Capito for West Virginia's online community. If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Capito for West Virginia, click here.

name: Jess Reid
subject: We could really use your help
body:
| Hi! My name is Jess Reid, and I handle our digital organizing for Democrats here in Virginia.

I heard from the team that you're a supporter we can really count on, which is awesome! I hope you know how much your support means for Hillary and for our country.

We're in the final sprint of this race now, and we need everyone to lend a hand. It's pretty scary: If we don't hustle, Donald Trump could really become the most powerful person in the world.

Since you're already a big part of our campaign, I thought you might be interested in taking the next step and joining our official digital rapid response team. We could really use your help!

We're going to be spreading the word all over the internet to make sure Virginians across the Commonwealth know how and when to vote for Hillary. Please email me back if you can help out with this, Friend! We'll arm you with all the information you need to help get our message out, so all you need to do is say you're in. Winning this election is so important, and you have the chance to be an active part of that victory in the home stretch.

You can also sign up by filling out this quick form: [**http://hrc.io/VA-Team-Digital**](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/team-virginia-digital-updates/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mp&utm_campaign=digital-rr&utm_content=va)

Can't wait to work together on Team #VirWINia!

Jess Reid
Democratic Party of Virginia
---

subject: Within striking distance of flipping the Senate >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74f7/24c69fd9/8254ff2/18ed45cf/3626779716/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW01N_digital_email_20161101_1week_n-all&source=WPEFEW01N_digital_email_20161101_1week_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Here's where things stand:

We're a week out from Election Day, and we have a lot of races that are going to be close.

**HOUSE:** Of our 21 red-to-blue House races, NINE are listed as toss-ups. Donald Trump's effect has made this our best chance to clear out some of the worst Republicans in Congress and replace them with pro-choice Democratic women.

**SENATE:** And we're within striking distance of flipping the Senate. _Cook Political Report_ rates four of our Senate races as toss-ups, but we are not in the clear by any means. A Republican super PAC tied to Mitch McConnell just dropped almost $18 million against our candidates -- with $7.5 million against Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada alone. We can't let this last-minute surge of Republican spending prevent us from flipping these seats.

**Donate $3 now to help our women come through the last week of this campaign strong and end their races with victories:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/One-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c74f7/24c69fd9/8254ff2/18ed45c8/3626779716/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161101_email_1week?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOneWeek&utm_campaign=WPEFEW01N_digital_email_20161101_1week_n-all&source=WPEFEW01N_digital_email_20161101_1week_n-all")**

Lucinda Guinn

| We are down to the wire and I need your help TODAY.

Our last campaign finance deadline is tonight and this is our chance to put Vermont back on a strong economic path.

There are very clear differences between me and my opponent.** If you want a more prosperous Vermont, a stronger economy, a state budget that never grows faster than your wages, and a Governor who will put education and healthcare reform back on track, then ****[PLEASE donate to our campaign today](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0dedc33409&e=19cebfe173)****.**

Vermont's future is at stake and our opponent and her surrogates are spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to attack us and deceive Vermonters.

Next Tuesday Vermonters will decide, and we are working harder and smarter than our opponent, to ensure Vermonters make the right decision in the voting booth. Despite the attacks, we still feel good about where we are, but we cannot let up! [******************That is why I'm asking you to dig deep and make one last donation today!**](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0e332372b7&e=19cebfe173)

I am very, very grateful for your support.

Sincerely,

Phil

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Outspent 4:1 for universal health care
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Big Pharma and health insurance companies are spending millions of dollars to stop voters from guaranteeing universal health care and stopping drug companies from overcharging for prescription drugs. We must also help a ballot initiative to support public financing of elections.
[**Make an immediate $3 contribution directly to these three ballot initiative campaigns in the final days of the election as a way of saying we need to fight the billionaire class trying to buy our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")**
Sisters and Brothers,
Big Pharma and health insurance companies are spending big money in the final days of the election to stop ballot initiatives that would regulate their profits. Just as the billionaire class tries to buy seats in Congress, big corporations are spending millions of dollars to defeat ballot initiatives.
In Colorado, Amendment 69 would establish Colorado as the first state to guarantee universal health care. **As you might imagine, health insurance companies don't like this very much. So far five health insurance companies are the top five donors to stop Amendment 69.** The campaign trying to pass universal health care is being outspent 4:1 because of these health insurance companies trying to protect their profits. [**Please chip in to support the campaign for Amendment 69.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")
Pharmaceutical companies have already spent more than $100 million in California to defeat Proposition 61, which would mandate drug companies can't charge the public any more for prescription drugs than they charge the Veterans Administration. If it passes, Proposition 61 would be a much needed check on the skyrocketing costs of prescription drug prices. **Big Pharma knows this would be devastating to their grotesque profits, and they're doing everything they can to stop it.[Take on Big Pharma with a contribution for Prop 61.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")**
We must also help pass **public financing of elections in Howard County, Maryland** to help establish a way for candidates to get the funding they need to run for office without having to beg millionaires for money. By establishing public financing systems at the local level, we can lay the groundwork for even playing fields in elections all over the country. Donate now to support [**Fair Elections Howard County.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")
There are 7 days left before the election, and we know that the billionaire class is threatened. That's why they're spending millions of dollars to defeat ballot initiatives like these.
[**Please make a $3 contribution directly to the campaigns supporting Amendment 69, Proposition 61, Fair Elections Howard County, and Our Revolution so that we can show Big Pharma, health insurance companies, and the billionaire class they can't buy our elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")
By taking on big corporations in these final days of the election, we can send an unmistakable message that our grassroots movement can win against the billionaire class.
Thank you,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-rev-ballot-initiatives?refcode=em161101-full")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").

name: Team Koster
subject: One Week Out — What are you voting for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4012005280438421504)

Hey,

When you cast your vote for governor next week, there's a lot more on the ballot than just the candidates' names. You will also be casting a vote for a vision of Missouri over the next four years and the future we want for generations to come. **Tell us what issue is most important to you and commit to vote on November 8th:**

[**I 'm voting for fully funded public schools.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4084062874476349440?utm_campaign=adv_school_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161101advschoolgqfultk&refcode=em16161101fldschoolgqfultk)
[**I 'm voting for equal pay for equal work.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4156120468514277376?utm_campaign=adv_eqlpay_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161101adveqlpaygqfultk&refcode=em16161101fldeqlpaygqfultk)
[**I 'm voting to raise the minimum wage.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4228178062552205312?utm_campaign=adv_minwag_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161101advminwaggqfultk&refcode=em16161101fldminwaggqfultk)
[**I 'm voting to stop "Right-to-Work" schemes.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4300235656590133248?utm_campaign=adv_rtw_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161101advrtwgqfultk&refcode=em16161101fldrtwgqfultk)
[**I 'm voting to expand Medicaid and create jobs.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4372293250628061184?utm_campaign=fld_medica_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&ms=em16161101fldmedicagqfultk&refcode=em16161101fldmedicagqfultk)

When it comes to these issues, Chris Koster and Eric Greitens couldn't be more different. Chris is an accomplished leader with decades of experience delivering real results for Missouri families. Eric Greitens has only proven he's committed to working for himself, and his only solution for solving tough issues is to blow things up.

Don't miss the opportunity to make your voice heard on these important issues facing Missouri families. [**Find your polling place, make a plan, and commit to vote today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4012005280438421504)

Thank you,

Team Koster

[COMMIT TO VOTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/4012005280438421504)

Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
---
Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-7808178956527073280/3939947686400493568).

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Thank you and please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b117/565818436/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Our grassroots supporters continue to blow me away. I'm happy to share that we hit our $60,000 end-of-month goal last night. This means we'll be able to fund many of the activities we need to take our campaign to victory over the next seven days.

We're now moving into the final phase of our campaign -- and it's a phase that relies heavily on people power. **In the next week, we 're going to need the help of Hoosiers from all across the state to get out the vote.**

**[Friend, will you please sign up for a volunteer shift to help us bring common-sense governance to Indiana?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b116/565818436/VEsE/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer-november")** Even if you can only give an hour of your time, it will be greatly appreciated.

Look, this race won't be won on the airwaves or in the media alone. It'll be won on the ground -- at Hoosiers' front doors and in their living rooms. **All that matters is how many people get to the polls to vote for us.** And you have the power to determine that final number.

**[Can you give an hour or more to make calls, knock on doors, or distribute yard signs?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b116/565818436/VEsF/ "https://bayh.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/volunteer-november") **With 20 field offices across the state, we'll find a place for you!

Thank you,

Evan

P.S. Can't volunteer? **[Donating](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b115/565818436/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161101&amount=25") is another great way to help our campaign.** **********[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b115/565818436/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bayh-email?refcode=20161101&amount=25")**********
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505ef/7be36b49/1e1c0b9e/78f9b114/565818436/VEsA/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Mike Weinholtz for Governor Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/3783254577688808192)
---
**_MIKE WEINHOLTZ FOR GOVERNOR NEWSLETTER_** _Haz click_[ _aqu i _](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/3855312171726736128)_para leerlo en espa ñol!_ **_MESSAGE FROM MIKE_** It's hard to believe there's only one week until the election! I hope everyone had a fun and safe Halloween, and that you're ready to VOTE if you haven't already by mail! Last month, I announced my official support for legalizing medical cannabis. It's safe, non-addictive, and would help us combat our tragic opioid crisis in Utah. Every month we lose 24 lives in Utah to opioid addiction and overdose. This is urgent, and it's time to embrace smart, practical solutions. It's just the right thing to do. **[Check out our new video on opioid abuse and medical cannabis to learn more:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/3927369765764664064)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/3999427359802592000) This issue transcends politics- it's literally about life and death- but Governor Herbert has failed to address the problem. A man who has been in office for seven years is asking to be re-elected to a THIRD term, despite having let a minor problem grow into an epidemic under his watch. My heart breaks for the lives needlessly lost, and my blood boils at the inaction and blind eye the governor has turned to their suffering. [**Time is running out**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936)**[- help me get out the vote!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936)** Tell friends, neighbors, and loved ones that this is NOT the year for apathy! Get registered, get out to vote, and together let's end the opioid epidemic in Utah! Together with you, Mike
* * *
**_GENDER PAY GAP IN GOV. HERBERT 'S OWN OFFICE_** My team and I discovered that Governor Gary Herbert pays women in his office significantly less than men- including women with the EXACT SAME job and title as a man. (Salaries for the Governor's Office are public information, so you can verify it yourself!) [**Check out the video:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4143542547878447872) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4215600141916375808) As Governor, I'll fight to end the gender pay gap both in the Executive Branch and statewide! The women of Utah and their families deserve better- and we can do better! [**Check out my official policy proposal for how to address this and other issues that adversely affect women in Utah!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4287657735954303744)
* * *
**_UTAH IS OUR HOME_** _-__**AND OUR HOME _NOT_ FOR SALE!**_ In both of our debates, Gary Herbert denied having ever said that he'd like to privatize public lands in Utah. FALSE! In 2011, he said those exact words. **[Check out our newest commercial and hear him say it himself:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4359715329992231680?v=gXKBjPwkF5g)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4431772924030159616?v=gXKBjPwkF5g) This is about more than Gov. "Available Jones" lying to the public, though. Actions speak louder than words: besides signing an unprecedented landgrab bill ("Transfer of Public Lands Act," 2012) he's already allowed millions of acres to be sold or leased. [**Sign up today to VOLUNTEER and help us get out the vote-**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936) [**and protect our public lands!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936)
* * *
**_MILLENNIALS IN UTAH VALLEY_** Last week I visited the UVU Economics Club as a keynote speaker. They're an inspiring, thoughtful bunch of students, and it was a great conversation (turns out I know a thing or two about business and economics!) Whenever I hear pundits bash on the Millennials as selfish or lazy, I passionately disagree! My son and his generation are as committed, tech-savvy, and compassionate as any generation before them- if not more so! That's why I've jumped at every opportunity to address Millennials and hear from them- their dreams, their concerns, and their ideas for a better future. Are you a Millennial or student looking to get involved? Or do you know one? Click [**HERE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936) to volunteer today and help get other young Utahns out to vote!
* * *
**_GETTING OUT THE VOTE IN WEST VALLEY_** This last weekend I went out with my team to knock doors again- this time in West Valley City! I'm very proud to say that my campaign team has built the single largest grassroots field team (meaning organizers and volunteers who knock doors and make phone calls) that Utah has ever seen! I want Utah to have a healthy democracy again, which is why I'm committed getting as many Utahns as possible engaged and voting! [**Wanna help our team knock doors and make phone calls? This is the last week so sign up to VOLUNTEER today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4071484953840519936)
* * *
**_My campaign isn 't taking any corporate money, which means that the only way we can win is through support from individuals like you!_** **_Click_**[** _here_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/4503830518068087552)** _to contribute now!_**
---

Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---

Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3551373069240825088/3711196983650880256).

body:
If my character on West Wing taught me anything, it's that poll numbers don't lie. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Whitford-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Friend -- As a starring character on "West Wing," I knew its storylines could stretch political reality a bit. **But looking back, the most scripted part was Republicans acting like rational lawmakers.**

**With Mitch McConnell at the helm, the Senate GOP 's dramatic episodes are now unprecedented. **From historic obstruction of the Supreme Court to threatening government shutdowns in hopes of defunding Planned Parenthood's lifesaving services.

**Worst of all, they 've stood with a rodeo clown like Donald Trump over and over again despite his racism, xenophobia, and hostility towards women.**

[**In just seven days, this country can declare we 've had enough, but I need your help to make sure that happens. Friend, will you stand with me and the DSCC today for Democratic victory this November?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Whitford-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Josh Lyman's polling savvy stuck with me and I'm telling you the stakes of the Senate couldn't be higher as Republicans lead swing states with razor-thin margins.

Thanks to billionaire special interests, they've yet to face the consequences of their moral bankruptcy. **But the Democratic grassroots can change that by getting loud enough $1 at a time.**

**Friend, when all of us chip in, we can defeat Republicans, their dark money allies, and retake the Senate. Please join me and the DSCC today to elect Democrats coast-to-coast:**

body:
Can my father count on you to help us reach them today? |

Friend, There’s a week until the election but votes are already being cast... So there’s no time to waste. We need to reach as many voters right now as possible to make sure they are supporting my father and our movement to take our country back. Can my father count on you to help us reach them today? Friend, your contribution of $35, $50 or $100 right now, will help allow us to immediately purchase more digital, radio, cable and television ads nationwide. These ads are powerful and inspiring, Friend. They feature my father and his plans to make our country great again. They are our best weapon against Crooked Hillary’s negative advertising that we have. But we need to make sure every single voter in America sees them. And to do that, we need to increase our buy power. Friend, you have the power to energize our advertising blitz into votes by donating $35, $50 or $100 right now. With the Clinton campaign, her Super PACs, and every other liberal group out there pouring millions of dollars into trying to defeat my father, there’s only 1 person who can stop them – you. Your support for my father will be grouped with other supporters to help increase our advertising blitz and reach these voters today before they vote. It is critical that we reach them right now Friend, will you help us by donating $35, $50 or $100? Thank you, Eric Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

| Dear Peter,

**** The Farm
215 Batten Road
Selma, NC 27576

Event Begins: 7:00 PM

Team Trump–Pence

subject: BREAKING: New Poll Shows Dead Even Race for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Yet another poll shows that the race between Navy SEAL Eric Greitens and career politician Chris Koster could not be any closer. This just-released public poll declares that the race is officially tied at 46%.

https://donate.ericgreitens.com/clinton-koster?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=28dcdfa663-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-28dcdfa663-99411629

With Trump and Eric surging at exactly the right moment and with the momentum on our side, we need every single person who shares our values to work overtime these final seven days to get out the vote.

Tell every one of your friends and neighbors, they have a choice in this election: Hillary Clinton and her candidate of choice Chris Koster, or Donald Trump and Eric Greitens. This is a fight between crooked career politicians and conservative outsiders who will eliminate corruption and take our state and country in a new direction.

We need your help to defeat Clinton and Koster once and for all. Clinton has invested $500,000 in helping Chris Koster spread lies. We need you to invest in our Get Out The Vote effort (https://donate.ericgreitens.com/clinton-koster?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=28dcdfa663-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-28dcdfa663-99411629) . With just one week to go before election day, Koster is banking on Hillary Clinton. Eric Greitens is counting on you - will you stand with us (https://donate.ericgreitens.com/clinton-koster?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=28dcdfa663-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-28dcdfa663-99411629) and have his back today (https://donate.ericgreitens.com/clinton-koster?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=28dcdfa663-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-28dcdfa663-99411629) ?

On to victory,
AC

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=28dcdfa663-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-28dcdfa663-99411629) with us!

body:
I have good news, and I have bad news: | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466c/1c469400/12ccd33/3543ac0/3944227794/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&utm_campaign=3mil&utm_medium=ema") Team -- So there's good news, and there's bad news. The good news: As of today, we're one week out from Election Day! The bad news: In the last 24 hours, Mitch McConnell's super PAC, the Koch brothers' super PAC, and the NRA launched new ads attacking Russ. Meaning there's $3 million in brand-new right-wing money pouring into Wisconsin against Russ. **This means we're facing $5 million in outside spending in the last week. With only one week to go, we have to push back with the full force of this grassroots army.** **[We need you to rush a donation of $5 to Russ's grassroots campaign --_now._ ](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466c/1c469400/12ccd33/3543ac0/3944227794/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&utm_campaign=3mil&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466c/1c469400/12ccd33/3543ac1/3944227794/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&utm_campaign=3mil&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Recent polls show Russ within the margin of error of Senator Johnson. This obscene right-wing spending could persuade undecided voters and mobilize Republicans like we've never seen before. **And Russ could lose.**
We always knew this race would be close. With one week left until Election Day, this fight is far from over. We need your help to show these Republican mega-donors they can't buy this race for Senator Johnson.
**[Make a grassroots donation of $5 to Russ's campaign and help us fight back against Mitch McConnell, the Koch brothers, and the NRA.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf466c/1c469400/12ccd33/3543ac0/3944227794/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&refcode=ema_2016-11-01_3mil_nd&utm_campaign=3mil&utm_medium=ema")**
One week. Let's leave it all on the field.
Thanks,
Cole Leystra
Deputy Campaign Manager

The bad news: In the last 24 hours, Mitch McConnell's super PAC, the Koch brothers' super PAC, and the NRA launched new ads attacking Russ. Meaning there's $3 million in brand-new right-wing money pouring into Wisconsin against Russ. This means we're facing $5 million in outside spending in the last week. With only one week to go, we have to push back with the full force of this grassroots army. "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" Recent polls show Russ within the margin of error of Senator Johnson. This obscene right-wing spending could persuade undecided voters and mobilize Republicans like we've never seen before. And Russ could lose. We always knew this race would be close. With one week left until Election Day, this fight is far from over. We need your help to show these Republican mega-donors they can't buy this race for Senator Johnson. "" One week. Let's leave it all on the field. Thanks, Cole Leystra Deputy Campaign Manager ""

Governor Hassan's race here in New Hampshire will determine Senate control, and we are dangerously behind on our fundraising.
Our grassroots support just hasn't been where we need it, and we've come up short of our goals a couple of days in a row.
We're locked in a dead heat (some polls even show that we're DOWN), and the only way we can bounce back is with a $100,000 grassroots surge today.

| **For Immediate Release: **
November 1, 2016

Contact: Ethan Latour
_ethan@philscott.org_
_802-595-3776_
**Phil Scott’s High Road to Victory Tour Roars into Washington and Chittenden Counties in Day 3**
_
Tour features Scott’s commitments to growing the economy, making Vermont affordable and investing in pro-growth areas like early education and infrastructure_

Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott High Road to Victory Tour will be roaring into Washington and Chittenden counties Wednesday, November 2nd.

“Across every region of Vermont, and in every demographic, we see Phil’s campaign to make the economy and affordability Montpelier’s top priorities gaining enormous momentum,” said campaign spokeswoman, Brittney Wilson. “Over the course of this campaign, Phil has talked with thousands of Vermonters about his detailed plans and priorities and his hard work, outreach and grassroots support is unparalleled in this election,” Wilson added.

The High Road to Victory Tour hits its peak on Monday, November 7th with a statewide sprint that will hit all 14 counties and conclude with a high-energy rally at 14th Star Brewing Company in St. Albans.

**Media is invited to join Phil and the team on the road. **

The schedule for Wednesday, November 2nd follows:

**_WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 2, 2016: WASHINGTON AND CHITTENDEN COUNTIES_**

7:00 a.m. Sign wave (Open Press)
Location: Waterbury Roundabout, Rte. 2 & Rte 100

8:15 a.m. Coffee w/ Phil at Maplewood’s Convenience Store
Location: 1 East River Road, Waterbury

9:05 a.m. WDEV-AM Open Mike, Radio Interview (Open Press)
Location: 9 Stowe Street, Waterbury

11:00 a.m. Media Availability & Sign Wave (Open Press)
Sheraton Hotel, 870 Williston Road, South Burlington

12:15 p.m. Lunch at Al’s French Fries (Open Press)
Location: 1251 Williston Road, South Burlington

2:00 p.m. Media Availability & Sign Wave (Open Press)
Holiday Inn, 1068 Williston Road, South Burlington

3:15 p.m. Meeting & Tour at Green Mountain Power (Open Press)
Location: 163 Acorn Lane, Colchester

5:00 p.m. Media Availability and Sign Wave (Open Press)
Location: Intersection of I-89 and Route 7

6:30 p.m. Community Spaghetti Dinner & Discussion of Ballot Items
Location: Miller Center, 130 Gosse Court, Burlington

7:30 p.m. Dinner & World Series, Game 7 – TBD (Open Press)
Buffalo Wild Wings, 555 Shelburne Road, Burlington

###

subject: BREAKING: disturbing news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:

| |

| **BREAKING: In Private, Burr Quips About Gun Owners Shooting Clinton**
\-- _CNN_ , 10/31/2016 This is disturbing.

Senator Burr was recorded _joking_ about Hillary Clinton being shot. Yes, you read that right.

**There is nothing funny about gun violence.** These remarks are incredibly reckless and potentially dangerous. They show a stunning lack of judgment from a public official.

Senator Burr has proven that he is more than willing to engage in the kind of Trumpian "joking" that has polluted our political discourse.

**It has never been more obvious than right now -- a week away from the election -- that Senator Burr does not represent North Carolina values.**

This race is a toss-up and it's time that changed, especially in the face of these egregious comments.

[_**Please, do what you can to stand against Burr. Give $5 or more to make sure we have the resources to defeat him >>**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42068/2cc31c44/4e9737b/19f9c88d/3359842161/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161101?refcode=dre161101_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

It won't be easy to win this race.

**The NRA has spent $7.6 MILLION to get Burr re-elected.** They will do anything to keep Burr in office, and it's obvious he'll say anything to prove his loyalty.

We can't let this kind of thinking represent North Carolina. [_**Give $5 or more to help make Deborah our next U.S. Senator.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42068/2cc31c44/4e9737b/19f9c88d/3359842161/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161101?refcode=dre161101_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Thanks,

Team Ross |

subject: Join Us Thursday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
There is less than a week left before the election next Tuesday, and Eric is taking his Mission for Missouri bus tour throughout the state one last time!

It's Eric's final visit to your area before the election, so it will be your last chance to see Eric before next Tuesday! Bring your friends and family, and RSVP below.

We hope to see you there!

THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 3RD

Harrisonville Town Hall
10:00 AM
Harrisonville Community Center
2400 South Jefferson Parkway
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/harrisonville-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29050712463?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629

Lee's Summit Town Hall
12:00 PM
Stonehaus Farms Winery
24607 Northeast Colbern Road
Lee's Summit, MO 64086
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/lees-summit-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29051588082?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629
Kansas City Town Hall
2:00 PM
Clay county GOP headquarters
8002 North Oak Trafficway Suite 107
Kansas City, MO 64118
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/kansas-city-town-hall-meet-and-greet-tickets-29054930078?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629

Columbia Rally
5:30 PM
American Legion
3669 Legion Lane
Columbia, MO 65201
RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/columbia-rally-tickets-29056261059?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=d7d46de506) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=d7d46de506-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-d7d46de506-99411629) with us!

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: be a Trump family guest on Election Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Join your fellow Trump supporters in New York for the biggest Election Night party in America. |

Want to come to our party Friend? The night of November 8th is going to be incredible, especially when the TV networks announce that my father has defeated Hillary Clinton to become your next president. Chip in $3 right now to automatically enter your name for a chance to be there with us, at our Election Night Party in New York. You’ll celebrate with us on that historic night. And, you will see my father in-person as he gives his first speech as President-elect of the United States. BE A TRUMP FAMILY GUEST AT THE ELECTION NIGHT PARTY Hillary Clinton’s friends in the media are getting more and more desperate to pull her across the finish line and silence your voice, Friend. It won’t work. We are fighting this all the way to the finish line. My father is speaking to huge crowds every day, and our ongoing TV ad blitz is promoting his vision of good jobs, strong borders, toughness against radical Islamic terrorism, and a government that works for YOU and not the corrupt elites. My father’s pro-America message and loyal patriots like you, has combined for an unstoppable force that is headed for victory on November 8th. name: Chuck Flannery
subject: Have you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
---
| Friend -- **Election Day is a week from today** , and early voting in West Virginia is in full swing. Have you made it to the polls yet? The results of this election will be determined by the team who can turnout more of their supporters. It is _**essential** _that every single supporter of Bill Cole knows they have the opportunity to **[vote early](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.wv.gov%2Felections%2Fvote%2Fearlyvoting%2Fpages%2Fdefault.aspx&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ev_11_1&n=1 "Vote Early") **for West Virginia's next governor. Don't know where your polling location is?**[Click here to find it right now.

](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.wv.gov%2Felections%2Fvote%2Fearlyvoting%2Fpages%2Fdefault.aspx&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ev_11_1&n=2 "Find your polling location")**
This race is going to be exceptionally close, and every single vote has the potential to impact the outcome of this race. Time is running out. The last day to vote early is Saturday, November 5th. Thanks for your support,
Chuck Flannery
Campaign Manager | Cole for Governor

name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: just one week to go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Every vote counts. We have just seven days to make sure Marylanders get to the polls to have their voices heard. |
Friend, we are just **SEVEN** days away from Election Day. We couldn't be prouder of the work we've accomplished together, but we need to know that you're ready for our final challenge on Election Day.

In an unpredictable election cycle, the best way to ensure that each and every voter casts their ballot is to make a plan.

**That 's why we want to know your voting plan:** [Have you already voted?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867e/46278578/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/Election-Day-Voluneers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Have+you+already+voted&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016")
[Are you planning to vote during early voting?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867f/46278578/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Are+you+planning+to+vote+during+early+vo&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016")
[Are you planning to vote on Election Day](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867c/46278578/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/Voting-Plan-General-Election?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Are+you+planning+to+vote+on+Election+Day&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016")
[Would you like to Volunteer on Election Day?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867d/46278578/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-chris-early-voting?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Would+you+like+to+Volunteer+on+Election+&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016") Friend, we saw in the 2000 Bush vs. Gore election how a small number of votes changed history. Every vote counts. We have just seven days to make sure Marylanders get to the polls to have their voices heard.

With your help in these critical final days we can make Chris Van Hollen our next Senator and defeat Trumpism up and down the ballot on November 8!

Many thanks,

Team Van Hollen [DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867a/46278578/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em110116_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016")

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b73/70cdc2ba/4731fd91/397867b/46278578/VEsA/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em111016&source=em111016") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

This 100-day campaign has seen incredible support, but the final hours count the mo | | | | | | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/cae71a74781043bd9e4ddc99767695eb?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=3339a6beb41e4d0fb21c35001a262c25&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=mobilization_gotv&utm_campaign=vol&utm_content=20161101-you-could-make-the-difference-16266-petition) |

| | | | Friend, **We’re officially one week from Election Day and we need your help.** This 100-day campaign has seen incredible support, but the final hours count the most. **_Your support in this final week could make the difference on November 8._** We must go door-to-door and make phone calls to ensure every Eric Holcomb & Suzanne Crouch supporter turns out to vote on Election Day. And for people who are still undecided, we must deliver our message to them, personally. **[Will you answer the call to volunteer and help us win this election when it matters the most?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/81f93433e499461fa60daa78e190983b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=3339a6beb41e4d0fb21c35001a262c25&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=mobilization_gotv&utm_campaign=vol&utm_content=20161101-you-could-make-the-difference-16266-petition)** **The direction of our state and the future of all Hoosiers will be decided in a week. I hope you’ll help us win by signing up to volunteer today.**
---

subject: Nate Silver’s projections as of 11/1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
A viable path to 270. | | As of this morning, the _Washington Post-ABC News_ tracking poll has us down one point, Derek. As of yesterday, Trump's odds of winning had climbed to above 1-in-4, per Nate Silver's projections. And he seems to be making up ground in Florida, according to a whole slew of polls. The truth is that Trump has a real, viable path to 270 electoral votes.

We have a very small window of time left to try to deploy the resources to our battleground states that it will take to guarantee a win. So I’m personally asking you: Can you be one of the 14 people we need from your area to step up and chip in to our GOTV Fund today to try to make sure we prove this poll an outlier come Tuesday? You’ll get that free sticker as a thank you, too.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justin=20Matheson?=
subject: One week out - 12% still undecided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
|
---
| | Friend

**[After last week's news that we've closed Inslee's lead to just 4 points with 12% of voters still undecided](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=75e85cda94&e=32f1a3df98)** , to describe the GOTV efforts this next week as "crucial" would be a gross understatement.

Every one of those undecided voters who sees our ads online and on tv, everyone who gets a call from one of our phone bankers, everyone who hears a knock at the door reminding them to return a ballot - those folks are making their decisions on who they want to be their next governor.

We need your help to make sure each voter that makes up that 12% knows who they're voting for, and what their vote could mean for our state.

With Inslee's democrats launching false attacks against Bill, we need to make sure the truth penetrates the lies.

[**_Can you send $45, $75, $100, $250, or more to help get our message out to these undecided voters and bring much-needed new leadership to Washington?_** ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=3c1baa3174&e=32f1a3df98)

**Justin Matheson**
Campaign Manager
Bill Bryant for Governor

P.S. The media is covering these new polls and the issues we're focusing on - and you can bet Inslee's team will have a fresh set of lies ready, [so we need your help to fight back!](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=2b5427c635&e=32f1a3df98)

body:
The GOP's big money could save the Senate and deal us some heartbreaking losses next week. That's why we need your help... [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend,**I was the campaign manager of a Senate race that Nate Silver predicted Democrats would win by ONE point in 2014.**

But what happened after the Koch brothers swooped in? **We lost.** It was a heartbreaker -- and thanks to the GOP's dark money surge, one that could repeat itself all over the map in 2016.

**With so many races in the margin of error, I 'm telling you from experience: If we get comfortable, we WILL lose. Please, will you stand with us in this crucial hour?**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Your gift could make the difference in states like:
* Missouri, where Jason Kander leads by less than 0.5%
* Nevada, where Catherine Cortez Masto is projected to win by less than 2%
* North Carolina, where Deborah Ross is behind by just 1%
* New Hampshire, where Maggie Hassan is holding on by just 1%

The Koch brothers see these margins too, and they know if we get comfortable they will win. [**Don 't let it happen -- please rush a contribution of $1 right now to help fuel the final 7 days of this fight >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you for standing with us, Preston Elliott
DSCC Deputy Executive Director

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

The election is closer than ever. Nate Silver projects many of 2016's biggest races within one percentage point -- and with 99% of our gifts coming from grassroots donors giving $200 or less, only you can turn them blue and deliver Democratic victory across the board.

Please consider contributing today. We only need to flip four Senate seats, but our ground game doesn't stand a chance unless supporters like you pitch in.

**[Contribute](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161101-Preston_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e804/2b07114c/4ee9ab03/7354c93a/2642479534/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e804/2b07114c/4ee9ab03/7354c935/2642479534/VEsHAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e804/2b07114c/4ee9ab03/7354c934/2642479534/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
